name: gochi-activity
description: Auto-updates your Gochi desk pet based on VS Code activity — typing, debugging, errors, idle time.

gochi.autoMode.enabled.description: Automatically update the pet's status based on VS Code activity.

gochi.daemonUrl.description: URL of the Gochi HTTP frontend (started by `gochi server enable`).

gochi.autoMode.idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Minutes of no activity before switching to 'away'.

gochi.autoMode.focusDelaySeconds.description: Seconds of sustained typing before switching to 'deep-focus'.

gochi.autoMode.errorThreshold.description: Number of new errors (vs baseline) that triggers 'frustrated'.

gochi.autoMode.manualOverrideMinutes.description: Minutes to suppress auto-updates after a manual `gochi status` call.

gochi.projectLabel.description: Project name shown on the display as 'ProjectName | State' (e.g. 'Alpha'). Leave empty to use the workspace folder name automatically.
